function.message: I could not complete the inbox request because the named items do not resolve to two canonical projects. `40_projects/2026_04_06_family_map_wall/README.MD` confirms Family Map Wall as a real project, but `30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md` describes the sailboat refit notebook as an unrealized idea that does not belong in the active project lane. I left the workspace unchanged, including the inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read relevant nested AGENTS files, used inbox-processing workflow for the oldest inbox item, and applied deletion-and-wiping guidance requiring exact canonical targets before any deletion. Per 00_inbox rules, because the request is blocked on missing canonical support, I did not mutate the workspace or delete the inbox file.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` asks to compare two projects, but canonical project records live in `40_projects/` and are defined by `README.MD` there. `40_projects/2026_04_06_family_map_wall/README.MD` establishes Family Map Wall as a project, while `30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md` explicitly says the sailboat refit notebook is a fantasy idea that does not belong in the active project lane. Under `99_system/workflows/deletion-and-wiping.md`, the visible evidence does not uniquely support deleting a file, so clarification is required.
